text:
Trix Farrar wrote:
> Got the idea from ports/140791:

> The attached patch links in /usr/lib/libssp_nonshared.a under FreeBSD
> 8.0 and later.  

Thank you very much. I can confirm that this patch to net-mgmt/net-snmp allows net-mgmt/php5-snmp to compile and run successfully again.

	Cheers,

	Matthew
